case_title: WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC VS. EDUARDO ANTHONY LAVAL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
